{# Vendor detail partial — tabbed layout with safety review, analytics, enrich, click-to-call. Receives: vendor, contacts, recent_sightings, safety_band, safety_summary, safety_flags. Called by: vendor_detail_partial route. Depends on: brand palette, partials/shared/safety_review.html, partials/shared/enrich_button.html. #} {# OOB breadcrumb update #}
Vendors > {{ vendor.display_name }}
{{ vendor.display_name }} — Vendors — AvailAI
{# Dark navy page header #}
Avail › Vendors › {{ vendor.display_name }}
{# Header #}

{{ vendor.display_name }}

{% if vendor.domain %}{{ vendor.domain }}{% endif %} {% if vendor.hq_city %}{{ vendor.hq_city }}{% if vendor.hq_country %}, {{ vendor.hq_country }}{% endif %}{% endif %} {% if vendor.industry %}{{ vendor.industry }}{% endif %}
{% if vendor.is_blacklisted %} Blacklisted {% endif %} {% if vendor.vendor_score %}

{{ "%.0f"|format(vendor.vendor_score) }}

Score

{% endif %} {% set entity_type = "vendor" %} {% set entity_id = vendor.id %} {% include "partials/shared/enrich_button.html" %}
{# Stats row #}

Sightings

{{ vendor.sighting_count or 0 }}

Win Rate

{{ "%.0f%%"|format(vendor.overall_win_rate * 100) if vendor.overall_win_rate else "\u2014" }}

Total POs

{{ vendor.total_pos or 0 }}

Response Time

{{ "%.0fh"|format(vendor.avg_response_hours) if vendor.avg_response_hours else "\u2014" }}

{# Tabs #}
{% for tab_id, tab_label in [('overview', 'Overview'), ('contacts', 'Contacts'), ('analytics', 'Analytics'), ('offers', 'Offers')] %} {% endfor %}
{# Tab content — overview loaded inline on first load #}
{# Safety review #} {% include "partials/shared/safety_review.html" %} {# Contact info #} {% if vendor.emails or vendor.phones or vendor.website %}

Contact Info

{% if vendor.website %}

Website

{% endif %} {% if vendor.emails %}

Emails

{{ e }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if vendor.phones %}

Phones

{% for p in vendor.phones[:3] %}

{{ p }}

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Contacts table #} {% if contacts %}

Contacts ({{ contacts|length }})

{% for c in contacts %} {% endfor %}
Name Title Email Phone
{{ c.full_name or "\u2014" }} {{ c.title or "\u2014" }} {{ c.email or "\u2014" }} {% if c.phone %} {{ c.phone }} {% else %} — {% endif %}
{% endif %} {# Recent sightings #} {% if recent_sightings %}

Recent Sightings

{% for s in recent_sightings %} {% endfor %}
MPN Qty Price Source Date
{{ s.mpn_matched or "\u2014" }} {{ "{:,}".format(s.qty_available) if s.qty_available else "\u2014" }} {{ "$%.4f"|format(s.unit_price) if s.unit_price else "\u2014" }} {% set source_colors = { "brokerbin": "bg-sky-50 text-sky-700", "nexar": "bg-violet-50 text-violet-700", "digikey": "bg-orange-50 text-orange-700", "mouser": "bg-teal-50 text-teal-700", "oemsecrets": "bg-fuchsia-50 text-fuchsia-700", "element14": "bg-lime-50 text-lime-700", "ebay": "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700" } %} {{ s.source_type or "\u2014" }} {{ s.created_at.strftime('%b %d') if s.created_at else "\u2014" }}
{% endif %}
